title: [CI:DOCS] Document CI-maintenance job addition
body:
This process is easy/quick to do but critically important.  It ensures that CI will always remain available in the event a CVE (or otherwise) backport is required.  These jobs are all actively monitored daily, and their execution ensures the CI VM images are forever preserved.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
